CustomField.description: this is filled by a L.FLOW for products that are marked a Consumable. If Opp has a consumable, then it can not Quick Close.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: this is filled by a L.FLOW for products that are marked a Consumable. If Opp has a consumable, then it can not Quick Close.
CustomField.label: Count of Consummable Products
